title: Instrument chypriote

pages.text:
OF CYPRUS

MINISTRY OF FOREIGN AFFAIRS

Chy pre

limies 425 3068.

No. 485/74

NOTE VERBALE

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Cyprus presents its compliments to the Embassy of France and with reference to the Financial Protocol between the two countries signed in Paris on 29 November 1984, has the honour to inform the Embassy that the constitutional requirements for its entry into force have been fulfilled in accordance with Article 7 of the said Protocol.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of

Cyprus aválls itsell of this opportunity to renew to the

Embassy of France the assurances of its highest consideration.

Nicosie, 16 January 1985

To the Embassy of France

Nicosia

AMRASSADE DE FRANCE

A CHYPRE

ARRIVE

12117 IN 11

cl
